permissionSummary.impact: namespace labels and environment/data-plane inference may be unavailable
sidecar detection from running pods may be unavailable
service inventory, workload ports, policy targetRefs, and multi-cluster gateway signals may be unavailable
DaemonSet workload posture may be unavailable
deployment workload posture may be unavailable
standalone ReplicaSet workload posture may be unavailable
StatefulSet workload posture may be unavailable
selectorless Service attachment and workload port evidence may be unavailable
ambient L7 waypoint enforceability may be unavailable without Gateway evidence; denied scope(s): namespace/omg-not-in-mesh
client TLS contradiction posture resolves to unknown without DestinationRule evidence
DestinationRule visibility may be unavailable without Sidecar egress scoping evidence
effective authorization posture resolves to unknown without AuthorizationPolicy evidence
effective mTLS posture resolves to unknown without PeerAuthentication evidence

authorization.unknownReason: data plane membership unavailable for authorization enforcement

findings.title: Mesh-managed workloads must have resolved authorization coverage
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-001 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply an AuthorizationPolicy that selects this workload and inspect the resolution chain to confirm its effective scope.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Workloads should resolve to default deny with explicit allow
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-002 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Establish an empty ALLOW policy for default deny and add narrowly scoped ALLOW rules for required traffic.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Authorization policies must not grant structurally broad access
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-003 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Replace empty rules and wildcard principals or namespaces with the narrow identities and operations the workload requires.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Authorization access must be scoped to explicit identities
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-004 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Scope ALLOW rules to approved principals, namespaces, service accounts, or workload identities.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Authorization coverage must resolve at workload level
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-005 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Correct policy namespace, selector, or targetRefs so coverage reaches this workload rather than relying on policy resource presence alone.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Ambient L7 authorization must be enforced by a waypoint
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-006 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Attach the L7 policy with targetRefs and select a ready waypoint whose scope includes the workload.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: L7 authorization without an enforcement path must be reported
findings.reasoning: Control MG-AUTHZ-007 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Provision or repair the selected waypoint and confirm that policy targetRefs attach through that enforcement path.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Mesh-managed workloads must resolve to strict mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-001 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply or correct PeerAuthentication so the workload resolves to STRICT, then inspect the attached resolution chain.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Declared workload ports must resolve to strict mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-002 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Correct workload-level port mTLS overrides so every declared, Service-bound workload port resolves to STRICT.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Workloads must never resolve to globally disabled mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-003 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Apply or correct PeerAuthentication so the workload no longer resolves to DISABLE, then inspect the attached resolution chain.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable

findings.title: Client TLS must agree with resolved server mTLS
findings.reasoning: Control MG-MTLS-007 could not determine applicability for omg-not-in-mesh/outside-api: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable.

remediation.guidance: Correct DestinationRule TLS mode or the server-side PeerAuthentication posture so client and server settings agree.

findings.unknownReason: dataPlaneMode unavailable: data plane mode unavailable
